prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.7 kg; Height 157.3 cm; BMI 29.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 181mg/dL; 9 months ago 192mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.1kg; 9 months ago 68.7kg; 6 months ago 72.9kg; 3 months ago 67.6kg; current 73.7kg), Height (12 months ago 157.3cm; 9 months ago 157.3cm; 6 months ago 157.3cm; 3 months ago 157.3cm; current 157.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 29.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.8mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 498mg/g; 9 months ago 711mg/g; 6 months ago 723mg/g; 3 months ago 740mg/g; current 593mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
